title: Plain End Sky
description: The end sky looks like weird TV static.  I just made it black lol.
body:
The end sky looks like tv static, so I decided to just make it black instead.  Hope you find this useful, and I might make a version with a brighter color at some point :)
![An enderman farm surrounded with pitched black sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69f4a240cbcea3d2592958b227c2507e9cce78ee_0.webp)
